rules.rule: every layout-review decision MUST be reviewer-attributed and cite composition_id, page_index (or 'all'), and decision ∈ {approve, request-changes, reject}.
layout-review decisions are append-only; revisions append new decisions citing prior_decision_id.
approval at page level does NOT promote the composition lifecycle; lifecycle transitions are recorded separately.
reject decisions MUST cite at least one rule_id from CP-/LO-/SQ-/RR-/PC-/PA-/IN-* tables.
